subject: RFQ: Bishop Arts Mixed-Use - Concrete Package
body: Please find attached plans for the Bishop Arts Mixed-Use project. We need pricing on all structural concrete including foundations, SOG, and elevated decks. Bid due 3/14. Plans attached. Pre-bid walkthrough Wednesday at 2pm.

subject: ITB: Legacy West Tower - Foundation Package
body: Invitation to bid on Legacy West Tower foundations. 22-story office tower. Plans available on BuildingConnected. Mandatory pre-bid meeting 3/11 at 10am. Questions due by 3/12.

items: Drilled piers 36" dia - 45 EA, avg 40' depth

subject: Pricing Request: Samsung Fab Expansion - Equipment Pads
body: Need pricing on concrete equipment pads and containment walls for Samsung Austin fab expansion. Cleanroom adjacent work. All pours must be scheduled with facility ops. See attached specs.

subject: RFP: I-35 Corridor Improvements - Retaining Walls
body: Soliciting bids for cast-in-place retaining walls along the I-35 corridor improvement project, Segment 4. TxDOT specs apply. Must be TxDOT prequalified. Night work required for traffic management.

subject: Budget Pricing: Children's Hospital Expansion
body: We're in preconstruction on Children's Medical Center expansion. Need budget-level concrete pricing for schematic design. Not a hard bid yet - we need numbers for the GMP. Detailed plans coming in 6-8 weeks.

subject: RFQ: Alamo Heights Retail Center - Flatwork
body: Need pricing on all flatwork for new retail center. Plans on PlanGrid. Standard commercial specs. Looking for a sub who can start mid-April.

subject: Bid: Leander Apartment Complex - Foundations
body: Multi-family project, 280 units across 6 buildings. Post-tension slab on grade foundations. Geotechnical report attached shows expansive clay. Please include moisture conditioning in your bid.

items: PT slab foundations - 6 buildings, 185,000 SF total

subject: RFQ: Pflugerville Fire Station #7
body: New fire station project for City of Pflugerville. Prevailing wages apply. Plans available for download. Scope includes all site concrete and building foundations.
missing_info: Prevailing wage rate schedule not attached

subject: Pricing: East Riverside Student Housing - Demo + New
body: Student housing project near UT. Includes demo of existing parking lot and new construction. Tight urban site. Please note crane access limitations. Drawings on Procore.

subject: Quick Turn: Allen Premium Outlets - Sidewalk Repairs
body: Emergency sidewalk replacement at Allen Premium Outlets. Trip hazard issue. Need pricing ASAP for 3,500 SF of sidewalk demo and replacement. Can you start next week?

subject: Budget Request: Baylor Scott & White Clinic - Shell
body: Early-stage budget request for medical clinic shell. We just need rough numbers for concrete scope. Schematic design only at this point. This is for a CMAR proposal.

subject: Pre-Qual + RFQ: DFW Airport Terminal F Renovation
body: Pre-qualification required before bidding. Please submit your company pre-qual package along with your bid. Security clearance required for airport work. Plans available after pre-qual approval.

subject: FYI: Upcoming Georgetown Retail - Concrete
body: Heads up on a Georgetown retail project coming to bid in 4-6 weeks. Just wanted to get you on the bid list. Plans are in permitting now. I'll send full bid package when ready.

subject: RFQ: Ft. Worth Water Treatment Plant Upgrade
body: Water treatment plant concrete upgrades. Specialty concrete required for chemical exposure resistance. Must provide Type V cement or approved equal. Drawings and specs on Procore share link below.
missing_info: Type V cement availability/lead time needed

subject: RFQ: San Marcos HS Additions - Concrete
body: Two classroom additions to existing high school. Summer construction window only (June-August). Plans on BuildingConnected. Davis-Bacon does NOT apply (state-funded).
